DECRYPT_CORE // ALAN_TURING_IMPRINTS
SOLSTICE CRYPT v1.0.0
SYS_DATE: ----.--.--
⏵ SYSTEM CONSOLE
🛠 CREATIVE LAB UTILS
📖 HOW TO USE THE CREATIVE LAB

Design your own optical puzzles and share them with other cryptanalysts!

⚡ Quick Start
  1. Select an Element from the dropdown below (e.g., Mirror, Emitter).
  2. Set its Color, Direction, and properties as needed.
  3. Click any grid tile to place the element.
  4. Toggle MODE: PLAY to test your puzzle live.
  5. Copy the SHARE CODE to send your puzzle to friends!
🧩 Element Reference
💡 EmitterShoots a light beam in the chosen direction & color.
🪞 MirrorReflects beams 90°. Mark as Rotatable for player interaction.
🔺 SplitterSplits white light into Red, Green & Blue components.
🎯 ReceiverThe goal! Set a target color the player must deliver.
🟫 WallBlocks all light. Use for maze boundaries.
🌀 PortalTeleports beams between paired portals (same channel).
🔬 FilterOnly passes the matching color wavelength. Absorbs the rest.
🔗 Sharing & Importing

Your level auto-generates a Base64 share code in the SHARE CODE box. Copy it and share! To load someone else's puzzle, paste the code and click IMPORT CODE.

🧪 Demo Puzzle — "Quantum Gateway"

Try this sample puzzle! A white emitter feeds light through a Yellow Filter. Route the filtered light into the Alpha Portal, teleporting it across the grid to the Yellow Receiver. Rotate the two mirrors to line up the path!

⚙ GRID CONTROLS
DRIFT STATE INACTIVE
STABLE

SECTOR DECRYPTED

Optic pathways stabilized. Rainbow feedback loops active.

SOLSTICE CRYPT

Decryption via Optical Redirection

Rotate mirrors and prisms on the grid to align optical beams. Split white light into Red, Green, and Blue, and synthesize new colors to hit the target receptors. Beware the Solstice Drift: some mirror nodes will drift out of alignment!
INSTRUCTION: CLICK TILE TO ROTATE CLOCKWISE // VERB: ROTATE
GOOGLE AI & ANTIGRAVITY ENGINE POWERED
